title: dactylorhiza sambucina var. hungarica
intro: Dactylorhiza sambucina var. hungarica, also known as the Hungarian marsh orchid or lesser marsh orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of Dactylorhiza sambucina var. hungarica include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential side effects.
